description_long: This is a disposable coffee cup commonly found in urban environments, such as cafes or street vendors. The cup features a cylindrical white body with a brown, ribbed cardboard sleeve for insulation, and a dark plastic lid that fits snugly on top. The sleeve is corrugated for grip and heat protection, and one side displays a simple white line drawing of a steaming coffee cup, serving as a logo or branding. The lid is slightly domed and appears to be made of hard plastic, designed to prevent spills. The cup is likely made of paper or thin cardboard, with a plastic lining inside to prevent leaks. Its size and design suggest it is intended for takeaway hot beverages like coffee or tea.
description: A disposable white coffee cup with a brown ribbed sleeve, dark plastic lid, and a simple coffee cup logo on the sleeve.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain white cup with brown ribbed sleeve and dark lid, no visible logo.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brown sleeve with a white coffee cup logo, and the dark plastic lid.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the plain sleeve and cup body without any logo.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the brown ribbed sleeve and lid, with no visible logo or branding.
